---
title: "Michel Learns to Code"
about:
    template: trestles
    links:
        - icon: linkedin
          text: LinkedIn
          url: https://www.linkedin.com/in/ogbinar/
        - icon: github
          text: Github
          url: https://github.com/ogbinar
        - text: "{{< fa envelope >}} Email"
          url: mailto:myk.ogbinar@yahoo.com.ph

 
comments: false
---

## Bio

I am a data specialist, currently working in a conglomerate in the Philippines. Currently, I'm a 2nd year Artificial Intelligence PhD student. My research interest is in unstructured data, particularly computer vision, multi-model, and remote sensing / geosatellite applications of machine learning. On the side, I teach / mentor about Data Science in FTW Foundation. I manage a tech data community, Data Engineering Pilipinas.
